mapper.select: SELECT up.id, up.user_id, up.perm_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, up.granted_by, up.granted_at FROM tb_user_permission up JOIN tb_permission p ON p.perm_id = up.perm_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY up.id
SELECT p.perm_code FROM tb_user_permission up JOIN tb_permission p ON p.perm_id = up.perm_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_user_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND perm_id = #{permId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_permission (user_id, perm_id, granted_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{permId}, #{grantedBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_user_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND perm_id = #{permId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_user_permission WHERE granted_by = #{userId}
